title: coryanthes bicalcarata
intro: Coryanthes bicalcarata, also known as the 'Monkey's Head Orchid', is a unique type of epiphytic orchid native to South America. This plant is known for its unique, helmet-shaped flowers that can grow up to 10 inches in diameter. The Coryanthes bicalcarata has been used in traditional medicine to treat various ailments, and it contains flavonoids and alkaloids that exhibit antimicrobial and anti-inflammatory properties. The plant's health benefits include reducing inflammation and fighting off infections, and it is often prepared into herbal extracts or teas for medicinal use.
